lint.description: Run all lint and type checks for the project (no files are modified).
lint.promptSnippet: Run lint and type checks for the project
promptGuidelines: Use lint after editing files to verify; it runs the same checks as CI and modifies nothing.

format_code.description: Format the project in place with treefmt.
promptGuidelines: Use format_code to auto-fix formatting, then run lint to verify.
